definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: I have a tingling sensation.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Un sentimiento físico resultante de algo que le sucede o entra en contacto con el cuerpo.]
definitions.usage_context_es: A physical feeling resulting from something that happens to or comes into contact with the body.

definitions.usage_example: The new movie was a sensation.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: The new movie was a sensation.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Una reacción generalizada de interés y emoción.]
definitions.usage_context_es: A widespread reaction of interest and excitement.
